message:
style: apply clippy fixes and reformat core modules for lint compliance

Systematic clippy and formatting pass across 14 frankenterm-core source
files to resolve compiler warnings and bring code into compliance with
project lint standards.

Data structure modules:
- cuckoo_filter.rs: reformat long method chains and struct initializers
- dancing_links.rs: break long assertion macros across lines, reformat
  node manipulation logic for readability (+44 lines reformatted)
- interval_tree.rs: adjust line breaks in tree traversal methods
- treap.rs: reformat priority comparison chains and rotation logic,
  split long generic type annotations across lines (+66 lines)
- rope.rs changes were in the prior commit (core feature work)

Connector/orchestration modules:
- connector_event_model.rs: minor formatting adjustment
- connector_governor.rs: break long method chains in governor logic
- connector_lifecycle.rs: reformat lifecycle state transitions and
  multi-argument function calls
- connector_sdk.rs: adjust line wrapping in SDK interface methods
- fleet_launcher.rs: reformat fleet spawn logic and error chains
- session_profiles.rs: break long profile serialization lines
- swarm_pipeline.rs: reformat pipeline stage construction
- topology_orchestration.rs: adjust topology graph operation formatting

TUI module:
- tui/ftui_stub.rs: major reformatting pass (+532 lines, -183 lines)
  restructuring the FrankenTUI stub renderer with proper line breaks
  for widget construction, layout calculations, and event dispatch
  handlers. No functional changes — purely formatting to comply with
  line-length and readability standards.

Cleanup:
- ars_generalize.rs: remove 1 line of dead code (unused ParsedCharset
  reference identified by fix_ars_dead_code.py)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:

         Some(value)

+    fn remove_at(
+        &mut self,
+        node: Option<usize>,
+        target: usize,
+        unlinked: &mut Vec<usize>,
+    ) -> Option<usize>
     where
         V: Clone,
     {
